tour.title: Configuration Layer
tour.description: Application configuration and environment settings. Key files: package.json, tsconfig.json.

tour.title: Core
tour.description: Core application files. Key files: init.sql, seed.ts, index.ts, handlers.ts.

tour.title: Data Layer
tour.description: Data models, database access, and persistence. Key files: schema.prisma, Admin, User, Location, Cabinet, McpDevice, Compartment, CompartmentStatus, PricePlan, Rental, LockerLog, AuditLog, Notification, UserSession.

tour.title: API Layer
tour.description: HTTP endpoints, route handlers, and API controllers. Key files: GET /api/plans, GET /api/health, admin.locations.routes.ts, audit.routes.ts, auth.routes.ts, cabinets.routes.ts, dashboard.routes.ts, locations.routes.ts, lockers.routes.ts, notifications.routes.ts, provisioning.routes.ts, rentals.admin.routes.ts, rentals.routes.ts, system.routes.ts, GET /, POST /, PUT /:id, DELETE /:id, GET /, POST /admin/login, POST /refresh, POST /verify-pin, GET /, GET /:id, POST /, PUT /:id, DELETE /:id, POST /:id/unlock/:compId, GET /stats, GET /, GET /:id, GET /:id/cabinets, GET /available, GET /plans, GET /, PUT /read-all, PUT /:id/read, GET /cabinets, GET /, GET /:id, PUT /:id/cancel, POST /verify-pin, POST /, GET /:code, POST /:id/unlock, POST /:id/complete, POST /heartbeat, POST /locker-event, GET /status.

tour.title: Background Tasks
tour.description: Background workers, job processors, and scheduled tasks. Key files: expiryChecker.ts, heartbeatMonitor.ts.

tour.title: Middleware Layer
tour.description: Request/response middleware and interceptors. Key files: errorHandler.ts, requestLogger.ts, auth.ts, asyncHandler.ts, validate.ts.

tour.title: Service Layer
tour.description: Business logic and application services. Key files: locker.service.ts, auth.service.ts, cabinet.service.ts, audit.service.ts, dashboard.service.ts, notification.service.ts, rental.service.ts.

tour.title: Utility Layer
tour.description: Shared utilities, helpers, and common libraries. Key files: jwt.ts, socket.ts, errors.ts, mqtt.ts, prisma.ts, qr.ts.

tour.title: Test Layer
tour.description: Test files and test utilities. Key files: audit.service.test.ts, dashboard.service.test.ts, mqtt.test.ts, notification.service.test.ts, qr.test.ts, rental.service.test.ts.
